title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXIX. Games.
content:
[Children hunting bats.]

        Bat, bat, (clap hands,)
        Come under my hat,
            And I'll give you a slice of bacon;
        And when I bake,
        I'll give you a cake,
            If I am not mistaken.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXIX. Games." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
